caption: A man wearing a distinctive, tall, grey peaked wig, glasses, and large black headphones sits in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white collared shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. He sits before a professional black microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing racks displaying garments and "LEE" branded tags. A red and white logo featuring a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" is overlaid on the left side of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, speaking and subtly shifting his head and facial expressions while looking slightly to the side. The background and equipment remain static, and the on-screen logo remains constant as the man continues his conversation.
